text: EARLY LEARNING MULTNOMAH MULTNOMAH EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Holds community meetings to address issues in the early childhood system and school readiness. 619 SW 11th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Visit website for meeting times Email (503) 226-9309 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 226-9309 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Website available in multiple languages AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Community Calendars * Parenting Issues School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
